marshmap 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Prepare map patches for U-Net prediction (worker)

Source: R/do_unet_prep_map.R
do_unet_prep_map.Rd

Tiles the full ortho extent (or a clipped region) into overlapping patches ready for GPU prediction. Reuses unet_build_input_stack() to ensure identical normalization to training. Saves numpy arrays, a patch-origin CSV, and a nodata mask for later assembly.

Usage

do_unet_prep_map(model, clip = NULL)

Arguments

model

The model name (base name of the prep .yml)

clip

Optional clip extent, vector of xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax

Details

Output goes to <site>/unet/<model>/map_patches/ (or map_patches_clip_<n>/ when clipped).

On this page
